Google AI Ultra just dropped from $250 to $100/month at I/O 2026 — with Gemini Omni, Gemini 3.5 Flash, Google Antigravity, 20TB storage, and YouTube Premium bundled in. ChatGPT vs Gemini just got real. But there's a US-only catch buried in the announcement that changes who this deal is actually for.

----
🚀 DYNAMOUS AI COMMUNITY

Want to learn agentic coding with live daily events and workshops?
Check out Dynamous AI: https://dynamous.ai/?code=646a60
Get 10% off here 👉 https://shorturl.smartcode.diy/dynamous_ai_10_percent_discount

⚡ HOSTINGER — RELIABLE HOSTING FOR YOUR PROJECTS (10% OFF)

Whether you're shipping a portfolio, a side project, n8n flows, or AI agents — I use Hostinger for fast, affordable VPS + web hosting.

Get 10% off here 👉 https://hostinger.com/DIYSMARTCODE

(Affiliate link — costs you nothing, supports the channel.)
----

What you will see in this 3-minute breakdown:
- The $250 to $200 to $100 price collapse straight from Google's official Gemini account
- The new 3-tier ladder: AI Plus, AI Pro, AI Ultra ($100 and $200 pillars)
- 5 features shipping at the $100 Ultra tier — Gemini Omni, Gemini 3.5 Flash, Google Antigravity (Google's Cursor answer), Gemini Spark, 20TB storage
- The US-only catch: Gemini Spark, AI Inbox, and Daily Brief locked to United States at launch
- The new compute-used quota system (no more daily prompt limits, refreshes every 5 hours)
- YouTube Premium bundled at $100 and $200 tiers
- The Shimrit Ben-Yair quote that frames the whole launch

Google AI subscriptions blog post: https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/google-one/google-ai-subscriptions/
Sundar Pichai I/O 2026 keynote: https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/sundar-pichai-io-2026/
Gemini 3.5 launch post: https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-3-5/
Dynamous AI community: https://dynamous.ai/?code=646a60
Hostinger (affiliate, 10% off): https://hostinger.com/DIYSMARTCODE

A hundred dollars a month for Google AI Ultra — actual deal, or marketing trap? With Gemini Spark locked to the US, the new compute-used quota replacing daily prompt limits, and the entry-Ultra capping at 5× Pro usage instead of the $200 tier's 20×, the value is anything but obvious. Drop your verdict below.
